description: Triggers when the user needs B2B sales collateral — pitch decks, one-pagers, objection handling docs, demo scripts, ROI calculators, or sales playbooks
should_trigger: Create a 10-slide sales deck for our enterprise B2B SaaS product
Write an objection handling document covering price, timing, and competition objections
I need a one-pager leave-behind for after demo calls to help champions sell internally
Build an ROI calculator for our HR automation tool showing payback period
Create a demo script for a 45-minute technical deep-dive call with a CTO
Design buyer persona cards for our three main buying personas
Write a sales playbook for our new market segment
should_not_trigger: Write copy for my marketing landing page
Create a cold outreach email sequence
Set up a referral program for existing customers
Design a comparison page vs our competitors
